# Earth Revibe

> Indian fashion brand for vacation-ready, minimal fits.

## About

Earth Revibe is an Indian fashion brand that designs vacation-ready, minimal clothing for people who value relaxed aesthetics and effortless style. From breezy oversized tees to laid-back essentials, every piece is made for the moments that matter — whether you're travelling, unwinding, or just living your day.

- Website: https://earthrevibe.com
- Category: Fashion / Vacation Wear / Minimal Clothing
- Region: India
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupee)
- Shipping: Free shipping on all orders, 5-7 business days delivery

## Products

We design minimal, vacation-ready clothing including:

- Oversized T-Shirts
- Relaxed-Fit Shirts
- Hoodies & Layering Essentials
- Comfortable Joggers & Bottoms
- Accessories

All products are available at: https://earthrevibe.com/products

Browse new arrivals: https://earthrevibe.com/categories/new-arrivals

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://earthrevibe.com
- All Products: https://earthrevibe.com/products
- New Arrivals: https://earthrevibe.com/categories/new-arrivals
- Search: https://earthrevibe.com/search
- Contact: https://earthrevibe.com/contact
- Track Order: https://earthrevibe.com/track-order

## Policies

- Free shipping on all orders
- Returns accepted within policy guidelines
- Secure payments via Razorpay (UPI, Cards, Netbanking, Wallets)

## Contact

For support, visit https://earthrevibe.com/contact or use the support ticket system in your account.
